items.title: Japan Wins Pairs Figure Skating, Knocking China From the Top
items.description: Riku Miura and Ryuichi Kihara of Japan emerged with the gold medal with a flawless, high-scoring performance after Monday’s free skate.

items.title: In Iran, Slain Protesters’ Memorials Will Test State Crackdown
items.description: Ceremonies commemorating the 40 days after protesters were killed are planned this week, challenging the authorities’ ability to restrain them.

items.title: U.S. and Iran Make ‘Good Progress’ in Geneva Talks, Foreign Minister Says
items.description: President Trump has called on Iran to reach an immediate accord or else face the threat of a possible U.S. attack.

items.title: U.S. and Iran’s High-Stakes Nuclear Talks Set to Kick Off
items.description: The U.S. and Iran have been flexing their military might as negotiators from the two countries resume nuclear talks in Switzerland.

items.title: Ukraine and Russia Hold New Round of Peace Talks, but Expectations Are Low
items.description: Both sides described previous U.S.-mediated negotiations as productive, although they did not appear to address sticking points like territory and sec...
